orders.title: Traffic Stop and Enforcement Procedures
orders.summary: Standardized process for initiating traffic stops, citation issuance, probable cause development, and required documentation.
orders.full_text: Covers stop initiation, officer safety positioning, driver contact, documentation standards, and mandatory report fields.

orders.title: Installation Access Control and Gate Search Authority
orders.summary: Defines gate checks, vehicle inspection authority, denied-entry actions, and escalation to law enforcement.
orders.full_text: Includes ID verification, random inspections, probable-cause inspections, and refusal-of-inspection procedures.

orders.title: Lost or Stolen CAC and Access Credential Response
orders.summary: Immediate reporting and replacement workflow for lost or stolen CAC and installation credentials.
orders.full_text: Requires immediate notification, temporary access controls, and coordination with access control center.

orders.title: Domestic Violence Incident Response Requirements
orders.summary: Response standards for domestic incidents, victim safety planning, and command notification timelines.
orders.full_text: Mandates immediate safety assessment, evidence collection, victim support referrals, and command/legal notification.

orders.title: Evidence Collection, Packaging, and Chain of Custody
orders.summary: Evidence handling and chain-of-custody requirements from field collection to property room intake.
orders.full_text: Defines packaging standards, labeling rules, transfer logging, and supervisory audits.

orders.title: Watch Commander Duty and Notification Matrix
orders.summary: Clarifies watch commander responsibilities, approval thresholds, and required notifications.
orders.full_text: Lists reportable incidents, required call-outs, and shift-level authority boundaries.

orders.title: Barracks Disturbance and Disorderly Conduct Enforcement
orders.summary: Response protocol for intoxication, fighting, loud disturbances, and unlawful entry in barracks areas.
orders.full_text: Includes patrol response, witness collection, command notifications, and referral criteria.

orders.title: Weapons Carry, Storage, and Armory Check-Out Controls
orders.summary: Policy for authorized carry, registration, storage, and armory accountability.
orders.full_text: Defines authorization, transport limitations, and required accountability logs.

orders.title: Vehicle Registration and Insurance Compliance on Base
orders.summary: Registration, insurance, and licensing requirements for operating vehicles aboard installation.
orders.full_text: Specifies documents required at stop, suspension criteria, and corrective action timelines.

orders.title: Impaired Driving Enforcement and Field Sobriety Procedures
orders.summary: Operational guidance for DUI stops, SFST observations, chemical test coordination, and paperwork.
orders.full_text: Includes probable cause indicators, test refusal handling, and command/legal notifications.

orders.title: Military Protective Order and Civil Protective Order Coordination
orders.summary: Coordination process for military and civilian protective orders, service, and enforcement.
orders.full_text: Addresses jurisdiction coordination, order verification, and immediate enforcement steps.

orders.title: Juvenile Incident and Referral Procedures
orders.summary: Response and referral rules for juvenile misconduct, notifications, and release procedures.
orders.full_text: Defines parental notification, command coordination, and referral documentation.

orders.title: Suspicious Package and Bomb Threat Response
orders.summary: Immediate actions for suspicious package reports and bomb threat communications.
orders.full_text: Provides scene isolation, EOD coordination, and communication restrictions.

orders.title: Duty Officer Incident Brief and Sitrep Format
orders.summary: Standardized format for duty officer notifications, initial incident briefs, and updates.
orders.full_text: Sets required facts, timeline fields, and follow-up reporting intervals.

orders.title: Post Orders and Patrol Zone Responsibilities
orders.summary: Defines post assignments, patrol zones, minimum checks, and response standards.
orders.full_text: Includes shift checklists, post handoff procedures, and deficiency reporting.

orders.title: Use of Force Reporting and Supervisor Review
orders.summary: Reporting deadlines, required narratives, and supervisory review process for use-of-force incidents.
orders.full_text: Requires immediate notification, body camera retention, and command review documentation.

orders.title: Search and Seizure Standards for Installation Law Enforcement
orders.summary: Authority and procedural standards for consent, probable cause, and command-authorized searches.
orders.full_text: Details thresholds, documentation requirements, and legal coordination expectations.

orders.title: Evidence Photo and Digital Media Management
orders.summary: Rules for digital evidence capture, labeling, transfer, and retention.
orders.full_text: Covers metadata preservation, secure upload workflow, and audit requirements.

orders.title: Shoplifting and Exchange/PX Theft Response Procedure
orders.summary: Guidance for retail theft incidents on installation including PX/Exchange coordination and evidence requirements.
orders.full_text: Defines suspect handling, merchant statements, surveillance retention, and charge packet completion.

orders.title: Harassment, Threat Communications, and Protective Actions
orders.summary: Response guidance for threatening messages, stalking behavior, and immediate protective measures.
orders.full_text: Requires evidence preservation, victim safety planning, and expedited command/legal notification.

orders.title: Marine Corps Grooming and Haircut Standards
orders.summary: Standards for male and female hair grooming, facial hair limits, and compliance expectations.
orders.full_text: Section Grooming Standards: Hair must present a neat and professional military appearance. Unauthorized beard growth is prohibited unless medically or religiously approved.

orders.title: Tattoo and Body Art Policy
orders.summary: Defines placement and content restrictions for tattoos and body markings in uniformed service.
orders.full_text: Section Appearance Standards: Tattoos are permitted only when placement and content comply with current Marine Corps directives.

orders.title: Leave and Liberty Administrative Procedures
orders.summary: Rules for ordinary leave, special liberty, approval authority, and accountability while absent.
orders.full_text: Section Leave and Liberty: Commands shall ensure accountability and approval procedures are followed before absence starts.

orders.title: Duty Roster and Watch Bill Management
orders.summary: Procedures for building, publishing, and updating duty rosters and watch bills.
orders.full_text: Section Duty Roster: Supervisors will maintain current rosters and ensure relief and accountability procedures are followed.

orders.title: Civilian Employee Timekeeping and Overtime Guidance
orders.summary: Explains overtime authorization, time card corrections, and supervisor approval requirements.
orders.full_text: Section Overtime: Overtime must be pre-approved except in emergency operational conditions and documented on official timekeeping records.

orders.title: Government Vehicle Use and Dispatch Policy
orders.summary: Requirements for official government vehicle use, dispatch controls, and trip documentation.
orders.full_text: Section Vehicle Dispatch: Operators must be authorized, licensed, and dispatched through approved channels before vehicle movement.

orders.title: Physical Training and Fitness Program Standards
orders.summary: Establishes physical fitness standards, testing requirements, and remedial PT expectations.
orders.full_text: Section Fitness Standards: Commands are responsible for enforcing testing timelines and remedial measures for non-compliance.

orders.title: Saluting, Customs, and Military Courtesies
orders.summary: Outlines required military courtesies, saluting procedures, and customs compliance.
orders.full_text: Section Military Courtesies: Personnel shall render appropriate salutes and observe customs in accordance with Marine Corps standards.

orders.title: Desk Sergeant Shift Responsibilities
orders.summary: Defines desk sergeant duties for shift accountability, dispatch coordination, and report quality control.
orders.full_text: Section Desk Sergeant Duties: Ensure shift coverage, verify log completeness, and elevate critical incidents to watch commander.
